questionHtml:
A large school has students from Year 6 to Year 12.

A group of 80 students in Year 12 were randomly selected and surveyed to find out how many hours per week they each spend doing homework. Their results are represented by the following cumulative frequency graph.

This same information is represented by the following table.

There are 320 students in Year 12 at this school.

Suggest a more appropriate sampling method.
markschemeHtml:
stratified sampling OR survey students in all years     R1

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: Suggest a more appropriate sampling method.
